Minor'S Compromise In Scd.
Off Calendar Dec-02-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Minor's Compromise hearing this day.
Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha/ R. Edwards, CSR: Tony Vaughn.
Bronislav Draganov, Esq. for Petitioner: Stacie Payan present as Guardian at litem for: Cody Daniel Vicente, a minor Claimant, was sworn and examined.

On the basis of evidence received, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved.
Attorney's Fees $85,000
Fees/ Expenses $99,751,69
A net balance of $ 215,248.31 to Carloyn Young, trustee of the Cody Daniel Vicente Special Needs Trust.

Order Approving Compromise of Claim signed in open court.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY

MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Minor's Compromise hearing this day.
Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Vicki Gross.
Tom Alch, Esq. for Petitioner: Stacie Payan, present as Guardian at litem for: Cody Daniel Vicente, a minor Claimant, was sworn and examined.
On the basis of evidence received, the Petition is Denied without prejudice.
